'''Ja Bardrin''', a ruthless and power-hungry [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]], was the leader of the [[Bardrin Group]].

In order to ensure his power he had his own daughter, [[Sansia Bardrin]], kidnapped and later commandeered the crew of the ''[[Wild Karrde]]'', ordering [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] to rescue Sansia from [[Chay Praysh]]. In reality, Ja merely wanted Sansia's ship, the [[Jade's Fire|''Winning Gamble'']], recovered so he could sell it to Praysh in return for highly-secretive weapons prototypes Praysh pirates had stolen from [[Uoti Corporate]], Bardrin Group's largest competitor in the marketing business. During his daughters rescue, [[Talon Karrde]] came looking for his crew along with the aid of a [[Noghri/Legends|Noghri]] commando on loan from [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] and many other members of the [[Smugglers' Alliance]], capturing Ja in the process.
